message:
feat(workflows/runner): Cx-first detection + abort entry points (ft-xbnl0.2.2)

Add Cx-threaded variants for WorkflowRunner's two external-facing
async surfaces so operator-driven detections and aborts honour the
caller's asupersync capability context before doing any pane-lock
acquisition, storage reads, or engine work.

New Cx-first API (asupersync-runtime only):
- WorkflowRunner::handle_detection_with_cx(&self, cx: &Cx, pane_id, detection, event_id)
  returns WorkflowStartResult::Error{"capability context already cancelled"}
  when cx.is_cancel_requested() rather than acquiring a pane lock that
  no workflow would ever release on the inner path.
- WorkflowRunner::abort_execution_with_cx(&self, cx: &Cx, execution_id, reason, force)
  returns crate::Error::Runtime with the same cancellation reason
  rather than issuing storage reads or lock releases against a
  cancelled context during teardown.

Both methods delegate to the existing non-_cx variants when the Cx is
healthy; the inner engine already installs a fresh per-execution Cx
as needed. Matches the pattern CC-1 has been applying across the
ft-xbnl0.2.2 lane (caut.rs 151d689c, retry.rs f4fbb7d4,
session_retention.rs 94faa166, telemetry.rs 820d95a9, watchdog.rs
137eff4e, restore_process.rs 4ed91d7d, survival.rs bb7a96b6) and the
search_bridge.rs slice CC-2 added in fdbf9347.

New deterministic LabRuntime tests (labruntime_runner, 6 tests):
- workflow_runner_config_defaults — stability of default config
- cancelled_error_variant_serde_roundtrip — "capability context
  already cancelled" message round-trips verbatim with the "error"
  serde tag; downstream telemetry prefix-match stays reliable
- error_variant_predicates / started_variant_predicates —
  is_started / is_locked / execution_id classify the Cx-first Error
  path as observably distinct from a successful Started
- abort_result_serde_shape — wire shape pins for abort_execution_with_cx
  outputs when the abort actually proceeds
- abort_result_omits_none_fields — skip_serializing_if contract for
  already-terminal abort paths (reason/aborted_at must be absent)

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-cc2-target):
- cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib workflows::runner::tests::
  : 31/31 pass (25 existing + 6 new LabRuntime)
- cargo check -p frankenterm-core --lib: clean
- cargo fmt --check: clean

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
